profile.about: My name is Raga Akbar. I'm a third-year Informatics Engineering student...
profile.title: Designer & AR Development

education.description: Currently, I am studying at Universitas Maritim Raja Ali Haji. As a university student, I continue to develop my knowledge, communication skills, and professional abilities through academic learning and practical projects.

In vocational high school, I learned practical and technical skills related to my field of study. I also worked on projects and assignments that improved my creativity, communication, and responsibility. During this period, I completed an internship at TVRI

After graduating from elementary school, I continued my education at SMP Negeri 003 Batam from 2016 to 2019. During junior high school, I improved my academic abilities and learned how to work effectively in groups.
I studied at SD Negeri 008 Batam from 2010 to 2016. During elementary school, I learned basic academic subjects and developed important skills such as discipline, communication, and teamwork.
